    "c_metadata_tables.py"
    "c_names.py"
    "c_ops_header.py"
    "c_queries.py"
    "c_registry.py"
    "c_symbols.py"
    "c_tables.py"
    "c_traits.py"
    "keywords.py"
    "type_registry.py"
  DEPS
    loom::py::loom::gen::ops::model
    loom::py::loom::core
    loom::py::loom::error::error
    loom::py::loom::gen::bootstrap
    loom::py::loom::gen::assembly::tokens
    loom::py::loom::gen::support::support
    loom::py::loom::dialect::view::view
)

iree_py_library(
  NAME
    c_tables_wasm_generator
  MAIN
    "c_tables.py"
  SRCS
    "__init__.py"
    "c_builders.py"
    "c_dialect.py"
    "c_enum_attrs.py"
    "c_enums.py"
    "c_format.py"
    "c_interfaces.py"
    "c_metadata_tables.py"
    "c_names.py"
    "c_ops_header.py"
    "c_queries.py"
    "c_registry.py"
    "c_symbols.py"
    "c_tables.py"
    "c_traits.py"
    "keywords.py"
    "type_registry.py"
  DEPS
    loom::py::loom::gen::ops::model
    loom::py::loom::core
    loom::py::loom::error::error
    loom::py::loom::gen::bootstrap
    loom::py::loom::gen::assembly::tokens
    loom::py::loom::gen::support::support
    loom::py::loom::target::arch::wasm::dialect
)

iree_py_library(
  NAME
    c_tables_x86_generator
  MAIN
    "c_tables.py"
  SRCS
    "__init__.py"
    "c_builders.py"
    "c_dialect.py"
    "c_enum_attrs.py"
    "c_enums.py"
    "c_format.py"
    "c_interfaces.py"
    "c_metadata_tables.py"
    "c_names.py"
    "c_ops_header.py"
    "c_queries.py"
    "c_registry.py"
    "c_symbols.py"
    "c_tables.py"
    "c_traits.py"
    "keywords.py"
    "type_registry.py"
  DEPS
    loom::py::loom::gen::ops::model
    loom::py::loom::core
    loom::py::loom::error::error
    loom::py::loom::gen::bootstrap
    loom::py::loom::gen::assembly::tokens

    loom::py::loom::target::arch::x86::dialect
)

iree_py_test(
  NAME
    c_tables_test
  SRCS
    "../../tools/pytest_style_runner.py"
  ARGS
    "loom.gen.ops.c_tables_test"
  DEPS
    loom::py::loom::gen::ops::c_tables
    loom::py::loom::gen::ops::model
    loom::py::loom::error::error
  PACKAGE_DIRS
    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/py"
    "${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/loom/py"
)

### BAZEL_TO_CMAKE_PRESERVES_ALL_CONTENT_BELOW_THIS_LINE ###
